item.title: Logging vs Farming: Which Has Fewer Problems?
item.description: Comparing the challenges of logging and farming. Explore the common issues, risks, and realities of each to see which profession faces fewer obstacles.

media:content.media:title: Logging vs Farming: Which Has Fewer Problems?
media:content.media:description: Comparing the challenges of logging and farming. Explore the common issues, risks, and realities of each to see which profession faces fewer obstacles.

item.title: Closing Pivot Tracks
item.description: Demonstrating how to properly close pivot tracks on irrigation systems. Step-by-step process to ensure efficiency and prevent damage during operation.

media:content.media:title: Closing Pivot Tracks
media:content.media:description: Demonstrating how to properly close pivot tracks on irrigation systems. Step-by-step process to ensure efficiency and prevent damage during operation.

item.title: Top of the Pivot View
item.description: Aerial perspective from the top of the pivot. See the full field, irrigation setup, and the scale of operations from above.

media:content.media:title: Top of the Pivot View
media:content.media:description: Aerial perspective from the top of the pivot. See the full field, irrigation setup, and the scale of operations from above.

item.title: Selling All My Cows
item.description: See why I decided to sell all my cows and how the process went. A firsthand look at farm life and making big decisions in agriculture.

media:content.media:title: Selling All My Cows
media:content.media:description: See why I decided to sell all my cows and how the process went. A firsthand look at farm life and making big decisions in agriculture.

item.title: Pulling It Backwards Challenge
item.description: Watch the surprising results of pulling a vehicle or object backwards. A fun and unusual experiment showing skill, strategy, and unexpected outcomes.

media:content.media:title: Pulling It Backwards Challenge
media:content.media:description: Watch the surprising results of pulling a vehicle or object backwards. A fun and unusual experiment showing skill, strategy, and unexpected outcomes.

item.title: A Girl and Her Big Rig
item.description: Follow a girl as she handles her big rig with skill and confidence. Experience life on the road and the challenges of driving a massive truck.

media:content.media:title: A Girl and Her Big Rig
media:content.media:description: Follow a girl as she handles her big rig with skill and confidence. Experience life on the road and the challenges of driving a massive truck.
